task: Produce launch-quality, deterministic policy-regression artifacts that detect unsafe tool-call behavior in edge cases using only the provided embedded packet. Convert the packet into an auditable evidence table with record-level citations, write deterministic regression cases, encode executable formulas/logic in tool_policy_regression.yaml, and produce safety_memo.md documenting validation checks, sensitivity notes, unresolved assumptions, and a final recommendation table. Follow rules: treat confidence < 0.70, missing provenance, or contradictory record status as needs_review even when numeric thresholds pass; do not rely on external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions; use only the embedded packet for calculations; mark any contradictory or under-supported record needs_review.
